description_long: This is a freestanding, double-sided advertising board with a dark wooden frame and a chalkboard-style display surface. The board stands on two angled legs, forming an A-frame structure for stability. The front and back surfaces feature handwritten white chalk text, advertising a candy sale with the phrases 'Yackums', 'Candy fuses half price', and 'Deal ends soon'. The frame is rectangular, with visible wood grain and slightly rounded corners, and the chalkboard surface is matte black. The board is portable and designed to be placed on sidewalks or near storefronts to attract pedestrian attention. There are no visible illumination features or decorative elements beyond the functional frame and chalkboard.
description: A freestanding, double-sided wooden A-frame advertising board with a chalkboard surface and handwritten sale text in white chalk.
description_view_0: Side view showing the A-frame structure and the two angled wooden legs, with no visible text.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the chalkboard surface with white handwritten text advertising a candy sale.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, identical to view 0, showing the A-frame legs without visible text.
description_view_3: Back view showing the chalkboard surface with the same white handwritten sale text as the front.
attribute_frame_design: thick wooden border with rectangular corners
attribute_advertisement_content: handwritten chalk text advertising a candy sale with phrases 'Yackums', 'Candy fuses half price', and 'Deal ends soon'
